evidence: main advanced four commits with zero commits behind the prior channel baseline
5331d20f6ef9b80ee4153132a70d4989780d916d requires data URLs for code-mode image output and reports malformed or unsupported image values as tool-call errors
active-turn environment state, sub-agent role restoration, and spawn-role validation changed on main
latest-alpha-cli diverged from the recorded alpha baseline: fourteen commits ahead and one behind
alpha delta includes permission, config alias, dynamic skill, environment-instruction, MCP/RMCP, session, and multi-agent paths

supervisorySessionController.summary: Requalify main turn-scoped project-instruction loading and the alpha permission/configuration and dynamic instruction/skill ingress; retain multi-agent ownership as unsupported.

idiomaticCueWorkbookHarness.summary: Compare code-mode image-output errors, MCP/RMCP envelopes, and context persistence with the Marimo adapter and raw observation contracts.

critical.title: Turn-scoped project-instruction context changed
critical.summary: Main preserves each turn's captured environment selection when loading project instructions, so settings updates apply to later turns rather than the active turn.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify repository instruction loading, turn identity, and context boundaries against captured per-turn environment state.

critical.title: Alpha permission and configuration contracts changed
critical.summary: The current alpha history changes app-server permission schemas, core permission configuration, config aliases, and sandbox-related policy paths.
critical.localContractImpact: Requalify the closed CUE and Pydantic permission-mode ingress plus fail-closed admission against latest-alpha-cli.

critical.title: Alpha instruction and dynamic-skill behavior changed
critical.summary: The current alpha history changes dynamic skill-selector implementations and related invocation surfaces.
critical.localContractImpact: Recheck repository instruction loading and session-phase constraints before treating current alpha skill behavior as covered.

high.title: Code-mode image output now requires data URLs
high.summary: Main rejects malformed or unsupported image URLs with a dedicated tool-call error and accepts image output only through data URLs.
high.localContractImpact: Compare workbook result normalization and reported-error classification with the new image-output envelope.

high.title: Alpha MCP and context-state surfaces changed
high.summary: The alpha delta changes RMCP tests, MCP tool-call handling, environment-instruction world state, session state, and app metadata APIs.
high.localContractImpact: Requalify raw result/error observations and context persistence independently from main.

notes.title: Sub-agent state changed on both channels
notes.summary: Both channels changed sub-agent role, spawn, notification, or resume behavior while CUEstrap binds one supervisory session and attempt.
notes.localContractImpact: Retain multi-agent ownership and cross-agent attempt correlation as unsupported until explicitly designed.

notes.title: Alpha baseline diverged and advanced to 0.145.0-alpha.18
notes.summary: The alpha ref is fourteen commits ahead and one behind its prior recorded head and now declares workspace version 0.145.0-alpha.18.
notes.localContractImpact: Preserve the current alpha head as an independent qualification baseline; do not derive alpha support from main.
